# Workspace Agent Defaults

For all coding in this repository, prioritize these local skill packs:

- `.github/skills/agent-skills-for-context-engineering/SKILL.md`
- `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md`
- `.github/skills/dnd-2024-sheet/SKILL.md`
- `.github/skills/srd-5.2.1-reference/SKILL.md`

Required behavior in this repo:

1. Use context-engineering skills for planning, decomposition, context management, and multi-step execution quality.
2. Use UI/UX Pro Max skill for any frontend/UI/HTML/CSS work, including layout, styling, typography, responsiveness, and accessibility.
3. Use DnD 2024 Sheet skill for any character-sheet logic, reactive rules behavior, and player-facing sheet UX.
4. Use the SRD 5.2.1 Reference skill whenever rule structure or mechanic behavior needs authoritative grounding.
5. When multiple skills apply, use context-engineering for execution strategy and domain/UI skills for implementation details.
6. Favor existing project conventions and avoid unnecessary churn.
